title: Filipino-Style Adobo Keto Stew
description: A twist on the classic Filipino dish, this keto version uses savory and indulgent flavors to create a rich and satisfying stew. Serve with a side of fernbrake or your favorite low-carb vegetable.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the pork cubes and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the pork from the pot and set aside.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the fish sauce, soy sauce, and bay leaves, and cook for 1 minute.
Return the pork to the pot and add the fernbrake.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 30 minutes.
Season with black pepper to taste.
